description: An outdoor photograph of the Frances Perkins Department of Labor Building in Washington, D.C., shot from below against a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. The mid-century concrete government building spans the frame, its name 'FRANCES PERKINS DEPARTMENT OF LABOR BUILDING' carved into the stone base. A large American flag hangs vertically at center between flagpoles. Flanking it are two large maroon vertical banners installed on the facade: the left banner shows a stylized portrait of Donald Trump with text 'AMERICA 250' and 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST'; the right banner shows a matching portrait of Theodore Roosevelt with the same 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST' / 'America 250' branding. A lone figure stands at the base. The image is a photograph of the building; the on-image text comes from the physical banners.
notable_text: AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST | AMERICA 250 | FRANCES PERKINS DEPARTMENT OF LABOR BUILDING
